# color a dice — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> An interactive color dice roller web application that allows users to roll between 1 and 6 dice simultaneously. Each die displays one of six vibrant colors: yellow, orange, blue, red, green, and purple. Users can select a custom background color, and the system ensures that whichever color is chosen as the background will never appear on any of the dice — creating a visually distinct and conflict-free color experience.

---

## Pages

### Home
https://color-a-dice-9e9ddbc3.zappy5.app
Unleash creativity with our interactive color dice roller! Roll 1–6 dice in vibrant hues—yellow, orange, blue, red, green, purple—on a custom background that never matches. Start rolling now!

### Thank You | color a dice
https://color-a-dice-9e9ddbc3.zappy5.app/thank-you
color a dice - Thank You | color a dice

- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Fields:
  - `name` (text)
  - `email` (email)
  - `message` (textarea)
  - `privacy_consent` (checkbox)

---

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About color a dice
An interactive color dice roller web application that allows users to roll between 1 and 6 dice simultaneously. Each die displays one of six vibrant colors: yellow, orange, blue, red, green, and purple. Users can select a custom background color, and the system ensures that whichever color is chosen as the background will never appear on any of the dice — creating a visually distinct and conflict-free color experience.

## Target Audience
- Interactive Family Players
- Color Theory Enthusiasts
- Educational Game Developers

## Industry
Gaming / Interactive Tools

---

- Flattened page text (for LLMs): https://color-a-dice-9e9ddbc3.zappy5.app/llms-full.txt
